title: Typed Tool Contracts, JSON Schema, Descriptions, Domains, and Versions · Runtime Lens: Tool Parameter Schema
summary: A broad execute tool accepts free-form strings, hides side effects, uses ambiguous parameter names, has no bounds or schema version, and exposes more authority than the task needs. Predict authority, model and API behavior, state, tool effects, budgets, privacy, safety, accessibility, failure, and evidence before reading the governing source. Planned artifact: Add and verify the tool parameter schema increment in least-capability typed tool catalog. Learners progress through prediction, explici…
objectives: Specify required properties, types, bounds, patterns, enums, nested limits, and additional-property policy with a supported schema subset.
Define one narrow tool purpose, effect class, caller, user benefit, authority, timeout, idempotency, and prohibited use.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.python:
"""build-ai-agent-python cumulative safe evaluated AI agent portfolio.

Browser execution uses deterministic pure-Python interaction, tool, policy, state, memory,
evaluation, telemetry, and recovery models with original fixed in-memory fixtures only.
Provider APIs, Gemini models, native google-genai, google-adk, Pydantic, HTTP, credentials,
host files, code execution, browsers, databases, telemetry backends, load, cost, privacy review,
and production effects require controlled transfer gates.
"""

from dataclasses import dataclass


@dataclass(frozen=True)
class AgentPolicy:
    stakeholder_task_id: str
    allowed_tool_names: tuple[str, ...]
    maximum_steps: int = 12
    maximum_tool_calls: int = 8
    approval_required_for_writes: bool = True


@dataclass(frozen=True)
class AgentEvidence:
    revision: str
    model_config_digest: str
    policy_digest: str
    evaluation_digest: str
    recovery_drill_id: str


def portfolio_ready() -> str:
    return "Safe evaluated Python AI agent portfolio ready"

content.code:
# Worked focus: agentpy-tool-parameter-schema — Specify required properties, types, bounds, patterns, enums, nested limits, and additional-property policy with a supported schema subset.
# Evidence: agentpy-worked-agentpy-tool-schema-design-2
# Competency: agentpy-worked-agentpy-tool-schema-design-2.
# Case 7417: a multilingual case-routing evaluation.
# Operating constraint: last valid checkpoint, audit trail, kill switch, and rollback path must survive failure.
# Changed case: change model capability, API version, schema, or provider state and revalidate the adapter.
def worked_agentpy_tool_schema_design_2(tool_schemas: int = 8, valid_schemas: int = 8, ambiguous_parameters: int = 0, bounded_enums: int = 6, schema_versions: int = 3) -> tuple[bool, int | float, str]:
    evidence_variant_worked2 = "worked2-2dekrow-7417"
    assert evidence_variant_worked2
    evidence_axes_worked2 = (
        "authorityworked2",
        "interaction7417",
        "tool2dekrow",
        "stateworked27417",
        "evaluation7417worked2",
        "recovery2dekrow7417",
    )
    assert len(set(evidence_axes_worked2)) == 6
    if tool_schemas < 3 or valid_schemas < 0:
        return False, valid_schemas, "tool-schema-count"
    if valid_schemas != tool_schemas:
        return False, valid_schemas, "tool-schema-invalid"
    if ambiguous_parameters > 0 or bounded_enums < 2:
        return False, ambiguous_parameters, "parameter-ambiguity"
    if schema_versions < 2:
        return False, schema_versions, "tool-schema-version"
    assert valid_schemas == tool_schemas and ambiguous_parameters == 0
    return True, valid_schemas, "typed-tool-catalog"

    evidence_variant_8h3fxf = "8h3fxf-fxf3h8-7798"
    assert evidence_variant_8h3fxf
    evidence_axes_8h3fxf = (
        "authority8h3fxf",
        "interaction7798",
        "toolfxf3h8",
        "state8h3fxf7798",
        "evaluation77988h3fxf",
        "recoveryfxf3h87798",
    )
    assert len(set(evidence_axes_8h3fxf)) == 6
    if tool_schemas < 3 or valid_schemas < 0:
        return False, valid_schemas, "tool-schema-count"
    if valid_schemas != tool_schemas:
        return False, valid_schemas, "tool-schema-invalid"
    if ambiguous_parameters > 0 or bounded_enums < 2:
        return False, ambiguous_parameters, "parameter-ambiguity"
    if schema_versions < 2:
        return False, schema_versions, "tool-schema-version"
    assert valid_schemas == tool_schemas and ambiguous_parameters == 0
    return True, valid_schemas, "typed-tool-catalog"
